title: Episode 24 is problematic
wikitext:
[]: Episode 24 is problematic.             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jun 23, 2014 5:35 pm I've been thinking about the fight in 24 and it's aftermath, and some things just don't add up to me. I wanted to just raise some issues and see what we can make of it. 1) How exactly does jamming a prog knife in the eva's head incapacitate it? Episode 1 clearly demonstrates that grievous head wounds don't mean an eva is out of a fight, especially if there's no pilot having to deal with the synchronization pain. It also can't be something lame like the battery ran out because Kaworu clearly tells us Shinji took unit 02 away from him. Honestly I don't understand how Shinji was able to stop 02 there without destroying the core. 2) Since the implication is that EoE or 25 happen just a day or two after this, how did they get Unit 02 back to fighting condition in such a short time? And furthermore why did they bother to do so when as far as they knew it was lacking a pilot and the unit was quite likely angel-contaminated?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Jun 23, 2014 6:18 pm My impression of the 24 fight was that Eva-01 won because Kaworu had stopped caring enough to keep controlling Eva-02. After Kaworu's big reveal, Eva-02 probably just goes limp as a rag doll. I dobt the Prog knife had much to do with things. Also, in relation to the damage, recall ep 06, where Eva-01's far more extensive armour damage was repaired in less than a Day by Nerv.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Mon Jun 23, 2014 7:09 pm Nope, Kaworu explicitly says that Shinji incapacitated Unit-02, and thanks him for doing it as it prevents him from escaping into its body. Remember, having briefly BEEN an Eva at one point Shinji probably has some idea how the damned things work.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jun 23, 2014 10:17 pm Maybe a sufficiently grievous head wound or one in the correct part of the head is enough to incapacitate an Eva that's not berserking.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jun 23, 2014 10:22 pm Evas don’t die unless the core is destroyed. They can be damaged enough to stop being useful, but they can’t die as a result of those damages. Seeing as how Unit 02 didn’t have an actual pilot (specifically Asuka), Kyoko probably just didn’t feel like coming out to play for as long as she would have otherwise. Unit 01 in Episode 2, on the other hand, was a situation in which Yui had Shinji and recognized him. Clearly she stuck around a bit longer to say “Hi” before resting a bit.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Jun 24, 2014 1:35 am We are also explicitly told Kyoko is 'hiding herself away', and between that and the fact that 02 is NOT fighting in a berserk manner tells me that Kaworu was doing that all by remote. Also as I pointed out he also explicitly says Shinji took 02 from him, so it can't be just that he stopped unless he's lying, which seems highly uncharacteristic. So how the hell does one random knife stab do what Sachiels' energy lance didn't... and if that DID do enough damage to shut the eva down, how did they fix it in just two days? Anything that would cause such an outcome can't just be something superficial like swapping out the armor, though that apparently also happened because 02 gets it's new, uglier face sculpt for the movie... which, again, seems like a literally colossal waste of time and resources. And another thing; if Rei nullified Kaworu's ATF, how is he still flying? And why is Shinji suddenly so hesitant to finish the job when earlier he took a deliberate stab at Kaworu with the progressive knife and had no way to know that wasn't going to just instantly tear him to shreds? I renamed the thread to open it up to more general issues with this most problematic of episodes, but I'd like to stay primarilly focused on 02 for now if that's possible.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jun 24, 2014 3:19 am NemZ wrote: We are also explicitly told Kyoko is 'hiding herself away', and between that and the fact that 02 is NOT fighting in a berserk manner tells me that Kaworu was doing that all by remote. Also as I pointed out he also explicitly says Shinji took 02 from him, so it can't be just that he stopped unless he's lying, which seems highly uncharacteristic.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jun 24, 2014 2:14 pm We don't know how Kaworu's remote control of Unit 02 actually works, to be fair. Maybe headshots disrupt the link. Maybe Kaworu feels what Unit 02 feels since he's basically syncing with it, and REALLY would rather not feel like he's getting fucked in the face.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 24, 2014 2:22 pm NemZ wrote: And another thing; if Rei nullified Kaworu's ATF, how is he still flying?

[]:             Quote Post by FinH » Tue Jun 24, 2014 4:24 pm I personally always subscribed to the notion that AT Fields are required for flight, but only because of the Mass Production Evas; they're too colossal for any conventional flight to be possible, and I rationalised their flying by assuming it was some sort of focused directional use of the AT Field.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 24, 2014 4:31 pm ^ Well, they have wings, dude. I mean, I know how unrealistic it is for them to actually fly with those wings, but we’re already talking about giant bipedal humanoids too large to support their own mass and body weight jumping and engaging in knife fights. So weight dynamics is kind of thrown out the window as far as that’s concerned. Plus, the animation given to the MPAs heavily implies that the viewer is to naturally assume that the flight comes from the wings and not from any other source.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jun 24, 2014 5:29 pm NemZ wrote: And another thing; if Rei nullified Kaworu's ATF, how is he still flying?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 24, 2014 5:43 pm If that’s the case, then they should still be able to fly with their wings put away. But we’re not shown that either. But we are shown them tilting their wings to change direction. And we’re shown them free-falling until their wings spread, causing the “flap” sound effect as the air caught their wings. The animation also clearly shows the wings effecting the air, creating whirlpools of wind that stir the trees around them as they flap their wings. Unless their wings are made out of AT Fields. But we’re not shown any evidence of that either. And even if that’s the case, the wings are used like traditional bird wings anyway, utilizing the concepts of life and downward wind propulsion. In fact, it’s never mentioned that Asuka was neutralizing any AT Fields or anything like that. As far as we know, the MPAs don’t have them beyond whatever’s used to hold the shape of their physical bodies. (And that’s if an AT Field is used for that as well.) Bottom line: Kaowru floats without his AT Field (or at least with it counteracted), Rei floats around when her AT Field isn’t capable of even holding her shape, and the MPAs only fly when they have their wings out and aren’t said to use or even have AT Fields. Maybe something else is at work here, but it can’t be said that it’s AT Fields without encountering a myriad of counterexamples, negating the notion.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jun 24, 2014 5:52 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: If that’s the case, then they should still be able to fly with their wings put away. But we’re not shown that either. But we are shown them tilting their wings to change direction. And we’re shown them free-falling until their wings spread, causing the “flap” sound effect as the air caught their wings.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 24, 2014 6:10 pm Bagheera wrote: No, we know they do have them because they're flying. Again, how else would they do it?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jun 24, 2014 6:15 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Either that, or AT Fields blow through their feathers and trees like wind.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 24, 2014 6:21 pm Wow. Let me know when the movie does magically give you an answer outside of what it shows you.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jun 24, 2014 6:31 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Wow. Let me know when the movie does magically give you an answer outside of what it shows you.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Tue Jun 24, 2014 6:54 pm To be fair, quite a lot of the fight happens offscreen while Kaworu is figuring out that the being in front of him is Lilith not Adam. All we see is Eva unit 02 fallen to the ground with the progressive knife in its skull. I'd assume that Shinji stabbed it several times until it collapsed. We did see in the first Eva fight that when Sachiel stabbed Eva Unit 01 in the head, Shinji's link with unit 01 was severed. Perhaps the same can be said of Kaworu's taking over of unit 02.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 24, 2014 7:14 pm True. We don’t have a lot of information as to what happened in the fight. We just know that they fought for a bit and after a while Unit 02 is on the ground with her head stabbed. Bagheera wrote: Seriously? That's the best you can do? The movie gives us basic physics and a mechanism to explain why it's violated, and you're ignoring that and pulling something else out of your ass and giving me the "wow" treatment? Really ?
